themes.name: Agentic AI in research
themes.description: Articles discussing AI agents designed to perform research tasks autonomously, from data analysis to content generation and execution of complex workflows.

themes.name: AI coding assistants
themes.description: Content focused on AI tools and techniques that assist in writing, reviewing, and securing code.

themes.name: AI research tools
themes.description: Articles detailing various AI-powered tools specifically designed to aid in different facets of research, from literature review to data analysis.

themes.name: AI summarization
themes.description: Content related to AI's ability to condense and extract key insights from large volumes of text, audio, or video.

themes.name: AI for product management
themes.description: Articles exploring how AI can be applied to enhance product strategy, identify issues, and streamline product management processes.

themes.name: AI customer insights
themes.description: Content focused on using AI to understand consumer behavior, preferences, and gather feedback for product development and marketing.

themes.name: AI survey optimization
themes.description: Articles discussing AI's role in designing, distributing, and analyzing surveys to improve data collection and insights.

themes.name: AI-powered data analysis
themes.description: Content that explores AI's capabilities in processing, analyzing, and deriving meaningful insights from complex datasets.

themes.name: AI for design & research
themes.description: Articles that specifically address the application of AI in both the design and research phases of product development.

themes.name: AI chatbot research
themes.description: Content that examines the use of AI chatbots for research purposes, including customer interaction and information gathering.

note: Themes identified by analyzing articles from curated sources, Google News, HackerNews, and DEV.to this month.
